title: Show the whole group name when groups are collapsed
excerpt:

posts.author: Lucyj1983 (Lucy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Each ‘group’ in our boards are a training course, the group name contains the date, course name, location & name of the trainer. As we run many courses we have our groups collapsed until we need to go into them. Currently you can only see part of this information as the group name is cropped. It would be really handy to be able to see the full group name when all groups are collapsed.

What are you trying to achieve

View full group name when all groups are collapsed.
